axioms: frithreith(x, novaux(x, y)) = novaux(x, frithreith(x, y))
depth_semantics: depth grades are bounded_canonical_rewrite_depth values: relative to the build-time bounded forward-chaining prover, never a lower bound on all proof methods

targets.statement: forall x. frithreith(snormox, x) = frithreith(x, snormox)
forall x. frithreith(freinir, glaglor(x)) = glaglor(frithreith(x, freinir))
forall x. frithreith(freinir, glaglor(x)) = glaglor(frithreith(freinir, x))
forall x. frithreith(freinir, glaglor(x)) = frithreith(glaglor(freinir), x)
